overview: Personalized medical weight-loss care and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for men and women. Services include comprehensive testing, prescription medications, hormone therapy with multiple delivery methods, and non-surgical aesthetic treatments.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) with pellets, injections, and topicals
Multiple non-surgical body contouring technologies (CoolSculpting, radiofrequency, laser treatments)
targetAudience: Men and women seeking weight-loss support and hormone optimization across all life stages.
